summary: The job failed when attempting to push a branch to the repository because the Git push was rejected with a 403 permission error for the user 'nextjs-bot'.
root_cause: git push failed with HTTP 403: permission denied to user 'nextjs-bot' when running 'git push origin update/react/19.3.0-canary-142cfde8-20260422'.

evidence.quote: remote: Permission to vercel/next.js.git denied to nextjs-bot.
evidence.reason: Direct error message showing the push was denied to the 'nextjs-bot' account.

evidence.quote: fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/': The requested URL returned error: 403
evidence.reason: Shows the Git operation failed with an HTTP 403 (forbidden) response from GitHub.
Indicates the repository/git identity configured in the job was 'nextjs-bot', which matches the account reported as denied.
The command that failed — confirms the job attempted to push a branch to origin and was rejected.

suggested_fix: Ensure the credentials used by the workflow can push to the repository: grant the 'nextjs-bot' account write/push access or use a GitHub token/PAT with repo write permissions for the push (configure the action to use that token). Verify the workflow's token and checkout settings are correct so pushes are authorized.
